name: Mixed Nut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a large or two small cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar and brown sugar; beat until well blended.
4. Add margarine; beat again until smooth.
5. Add eggs; beat until combined.
6. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off.
7. Stir in flour, baking powder, and pumpkin pie spice; mix until just combined.
8. Stir in chopped mixed nuts.
9. Using spray-coated hands, shape dough into three 7-inch long rolls.
10. Place rolls at least 3 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheets.
11. Flatten each roll to form a rectangle that is approximately 3/4 inch thick, 3 inches wide, and 7 inches long.
12. Bake for 18-25 minutes or until rectangles are light golden brown and firm to the touch.
13. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks for about 5 minutes.
14. Wipe cookie sheets clean.
15. Using a serrated knife, cut each rectangle into half-inch slices; place slices cut-side up back onto the cookie sheets.
16. Bake for an additional 6-8 minutes or until the top surface is slightly dry.
17. Turn cookies over and bake another 6-8 minutes or until the top surface is slightly dry.
18. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks.
19. Store in a tightly covered container. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
